description_long: This is a large, stately house set on a manicured green lawn, featuring a symmetrical layout with a central main building flanked by two smaller wings. The structure is predominantly white with dark gray, hipped roofs and multiple chimneys, giving it a classic and elegant appearance. Tall, slender trees line the front and sides, enhancing the formal landscaping. The main entrance is accentuated by a prominent portico with columns and a set of steps leading up to double doors. Windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows across all visible facades, contributing to the balanced and orderly aesthetic. The property is bordered by a low wall and a straight pathway leading directly to the entryway.
description: A grand, white symmetrical house with dark hipped roofs, formal landscaping, and a columned entryway, set on a large green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with columns, central steps, symmetrical wings, and a straight pathway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the house, the arrangement of the wings, and the placement of tall trees along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional windows, and the continuation of the symmetrical design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the other wing, side windows, and the landscaped lawn.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double doors with a columned portico, steps, and a straight approach path
